"content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [53, 35, 604, 111], "draw": false, "focusable": false, "long-clickable": false, "visibility": "visible", "focused": false, "clickable": false, "abs-pos": true, "font-family": "sans-serif", "class": "android.widget.TextView", "visible-to-user": true, "enabled": true, "bounds": [88, 351, 639, 427], "pressed": "not_pressed"}, {"text": "Astigmatism is a vision condition that causes blurred vision due either to the irregular shape of the cornea, the clear front cover of the eye, or sometimes the curvature of the lens inside the eye. In this case the cornea is not fully a circular dome, but it is shaped more like a football.
Astigmatism makes it difficult to see fine details, either close up or from a distance. If you have uncorrected astigmatism, you can have various symptoms such as blurry vision, eyestrain, tired eyes or headaches.
Astigmatism can be quickly and easily corrected with eyeglasses, astigmatic contact lenses or laser surgery.", "resource-id": "com.b2creativedesigns.eyetest:id/tv_whatis", "adapter-view": false, Hold your phone approximately 30 cm/12 inches from your eyes. The center of the screen should be approximately at the level of your eyes. Test one eye at a time.
2. On the next screen observe each lines or squares carefully.
3. Are all the lines black in color and are equally thick? Are all the squares in the same black in color? Or does one or more colors appear gray?
If you see some lines gray or distorted, you may have astigmatism.", "resource-id": "com.b2creativedesigns.eyetest:id/tv_instructions", "adapter-view": false, "pointer": "c4b8d90",
